description_long: This is a modern smartphone with a rectangular form factor, featuring a white front bezel and a large touchscreen display. The front screen is visibly cracked and displays a colorful wallpaper with a prominent Mario character and various icons, suggesting it is powered on. The back of the device is metallic gold with a single camera lens located at the top left corner and a small circular flash next to it. The 'mi' logo is centered on the lower back, and a speaker grille is present near the bottom. The sides of the phone are slim, with visible physical buttons likely for power and volume control. The overall design is sleek and typical of contemporary mobile phones, with a combination of glass and metal materials.
description: A modern, slim smartphone with a cracked white front, gold metallic back, and a Mario-themed display. Features a single rear camera, 'mi' logo, and side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing a cracked white bezel, large touchscreen with Mario-themed wallpaper, and visible front-facing sensors.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim profile and side buttons, likely for volume and power.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a gold metallic finish, single camera at the top left, 'mi' logo centered, and speaker grille at the bottom.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the thinness of the device with minimal visible features.
attribute_brand_logo: A gray 'mi' logo is centered on the back of the device, below the camera and above the speaker grille.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful Mario-themed wallpaper with Mario's face prominently in the center, surrounded by smaller characters and icons. Several app icons and a green play button are visible at the bottom.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens is located at the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small circular flash next to it.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the left edge, likely including a volume rocker and a power button. No buttons are present on the front or back.
